parts.text: Write a Unity boss monster script with 4 attack patterns (Aimed Shot, Spiral Shot, Spread Shot, and Laser Telegraph Shot) using a coroutine-based state management system.
Increase the difficulty of the existing boss. Make the bullet hell more complex, add patterns that pressure the player, and optimize the code.
Create a Unity boss script with 4 completely new and unique patterns: Boomerang, Grid Laser, Wave Ring, and Pinpoint Bloom.
Lower the difficulty of the 4 new boss patterns. Widen the gaps between bullets and give the player enough time to react.
